title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Schoolnet India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Schoolnet India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the Schoolnet India Advisory Limited family as a Teacher in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Schoolnet India Advisory Limited:
Schoolnet India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India Advisory Limited!
